author: AdExchanger Guest Columnist
title: The Open Web Is Shifting From An Audience Economy To A Context Economy
description: The open web is moving beyond identity-based systems built around audience data to context systems that understand who a person is, where they are, what surrounds them and what’s happening right now. We already know what this next stage of open web ad tech wi…
